name: SQLitePCLRaw.provider.e_sqlite3
description: SQLitePCL.raw is a Portable Class Library (PCL) for low-level (raw) access to SQLite.  Packages named 'SQLitePCLRaw.provider.*' (like this one) are 'plugins' that allow SQLitePCLRaw.core to access the native SQLite library.  This provider does DllImport of 'e_sqlite3', the SQLite builds provided with SQLitePCLRaw.
